CONST AuthTypeIAM AuthType = "SASL/IAM"
CONST AuthTypeSASLPlain AuthType = "SASL/PLAIN"
CONST AuthTypeSASLSCRAM AuthType = "SASL/SCRAM"
CONST AuthTypeTLS AuthType = "TLS"
CONST AuthTypeUnauthenticatedPlaintext AuthType = "Unauthenticated (Plaintext)"
CONST AuthTypeUnauthenticatedTLS AuthType = "Unauthenticated (TLS Encryption)"
CONST BrokerTypeExpress BrokerType = "express"
CONST BrokerTypeStandard BrokerType = "standard"
CONST ConnectAuthMethodSaslScram ConnectAuthMethod = "SASL/SCRAM"
CONST ConnectAuthMethodTls ConnectAuthMethod = "TLS"
CONST ConnectAuthMethodUnauthenticated ConnectAuthMethod = "Unauthenticated"
CONST EventFence = "fence"
CONST EventInitialize = "initialize"
CONST EventPromote = "promote"
CONST EventSwitch = "switch"
CONST EventWaitForLags = "wait_for_lags"
CONST ExternalOutboundClusterLink MigrationType = 2
CONST ExternalOutboundClusterLinkPlaintext MigrationType = 3
CONST JumpClusterIam MigrationType = 5
CONST JumpClusterSaslScram MigrationType = 4
CONST MetricBackendCloudWatch MetricBackend = "cloudwatch"
CONST MetricBackendJolokia MetricBackend = "jolokia"
CONST MetricBackendPrometheus MetricBackend = "prometheus"
CONST MigrateTopicsModeMirror = "mirror"
CONST MigrateTopicsModeNew = "new"
CONST PublicMskEndpoints MigrationType = 1
CONST SchemaRegistryAuthTypeBasicAuth SchemaRegistryAuthType = "BasicAuth"
CONST SchemaRegistryAuthTypeUnauthenticated SchemaRegistryAuthType = "Unauthenticated"
CONST ServiceAWSCertificateManager = "AWS Certificate Manager"
CONST ServiceEC2Other = "EC2 - Other"
CONST ServiceELB = "Amazon Elastic Load Balancing"
CONST ServiceMSK = "Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka"
CONST ServiceVPC = "Amazon Virtual Private Cloud"
CONST SourceTypeMSK SourceType = "msk"
CONST SourceTypeOSK SourceType = "osk"
CONST StateFenced = "fenced"
CONST StateInitialized = "initialized"
CONST StateLagsOk = "lags_ok"
CONST StatePromoted = "promoted"
CONST StateSwitched = "switched"
CONST StateUninitialized = "uninitialized"
FUNC AllAuthTypes() []string
FUNC CalculateTopicSummaryFromDetails(topicDetails []TopicDetails) TopicSummary
FUNC FormatQueryDuration(d time.Duration) string
FUNC NewCredentialsFrom(fromCredentials *Credentials) *Credentials
FUNC NewCredentialsFromFile(credentialsYamlPath string) *Credentials, []error
FUNC NewMigrationState() *MigrationState
FUNC NewMigrationStateFromFile(filePath string) *MigrationState, error
FUNC NewOSKCredentialsFromFile(credentialsYamlPath string) *OSKCredentials, []error
FUNC NewProcessedAggregates() ProcessedAggregates
FUNC NewStateFrom(fromState *State) *State
FUNC NewStateFromBytes(data []byte) *State, error
FUNC NewStateFromFile(stateFile string) *State, error
FUNC NormalizeSaslMechanism(mechanism string) string
FUNC ToMigrationType(input string) MigrationType, error
METHOD (*AWSClientInformation) GetAllBootstrapBrokersForAuthType(authType AuthType) []string, error
METHOD (*AWSClientInformation) GetBootstrapBrokersForAuthType(authType AuthType) []string, error
METHOD (*AuthMethodConfig) MergeWith(existing AuthMethodConfig)
METHOD (*Credentials) FindClusterByArn(arn string) *ClusterAuth, error
METHOD (*Credentials) ToYaml() []byte, error
METHOD (*Credentials) UpsertRegion(newRegion RegionAuth)
METHOD (*Credentials) WriteToFile(filePath string) error
METHOD (*DiscoveredRegion) RefreshClusters(newClusters []DiscoveredCluster)
METHOD (*KafkaAdminClientInformation) CalculateTopicSummary() TopicSummary
METHOD (*KafkaAdminClientInformation) MergeFrom(other KafkaAdminClientInformation)
METHOD (*KafkaAdminClientInformation) SetSelfManagedConnectors(connectors []SelfManagedConnector)
METHOD (*KafkaAdminClientInformation) SetTopics(topicDetails []TopicDetails)
METHOD (*MigrationState) GetMigrationById(migrationId string) *MigrationConfig, error
METHOD (*MigrationState) UpsertMigration(config MigrationConfig)
METHOD (*MigrationState) WriteToFile(filePath string) error
METHOD (*OSKCredentials) WriteToFile(filePath string) error
METHOD (*ProcessedAggregates) ForService(name string) *ServiceCostAggregates
METHOD (*RegionAuth) MergeClusterConfigs(existingRegion RegionAuth)
METHOD (*SchemaRegistriesState) UpsertConfluentSchemaRegistry(sr SchemaRegistryInformation)
METHOD (*SchemaRegistriesState) UpsertGlueSchemaRegistry(gr GlueSchemaRegistryInformation)
METHOD (*State) GetClusterByArn(clusterArn string) *DiscoveredCluster, error
METHOD (*State) GetOSKClusterByID(id string) *OSKDiscoveredCluster, error
METHOD (*State) PersistStateFile(stateFile string) error
METHOD (*State) UpsertDiscoveredClients(regionName string, clusterName string, discoveredClients []DiscoveredClient) error
METHOD (*State) UpsertRegion(newRegion DiscoveredRegion)
METHOD (*State) WriteReportCommands(filePath string, stateFilePath string) error
METHOD (*State) WriteToFile(filePath string) error
METHOD (AuthType) IsValid() bool
METHOD (AuthType) Values() []string
METHOD (ClusterAuth) GetAuthMethods() []AuthType
METHOD (ClusterAuth) GetSelectedAuthType() AuthType, error
METHOD (Credentials) Validate() bool, []error
METHOD (MigrationType) IsValid() bool
METHOD (MigrationType) RequiresSaslScram() bool
METHOD (OSKClusterAuth) GetAuthMethods() []AuthType
METHOD (OSKClusterAuth) GetSelectedAuthType() AuthType, error
METHOD (OSKClusterAuth) HasJolokiaConfig() bool
METHOD (OSKClusterAuth) HasPrometheusConfig() bool
METHOD (OSKCredentials) Validate() bool, []error
TYPE ACLMapping struct { Operation string; RequiresPattern bool; ResourceType string }
TYPE AWSClientInformation struct { BootstrapBrokers kafka.GetBootstrapBrokersOutput `json:"bootstrap_brokers"`; ClientVpcConnections []kafkatypes.ClientVpcConnection `json:"client_vpc_connections"`; ClusterNetworking ClusterNetworking `json:"cluster_networking"`; ClusterOperations []kafkatypes.ClusterOperationV2Summary `json:"cluster_operations"`; CompatibleVersions kafka.GetCompatibleKafkaVersionsOutput `json:"compatible_versions"`; Connectors []ConnectorSummary `json:"connectors"`; MskClusterConfig kafkatypes.Cluster `json:"msk_cluster_config"`; Nodes []kafkatypes.NodeInfo `json:"nodes"`; Policy kafka.GetClusterPolicyOutput `json:"policy"`; ScramSecrets []string `json:"ScramSecrets"` }
TYPE Acls struct { Host string `json:"Host"`; Operation string `json:"Operation"`; PermissionType string `json:"PermissionType"`; Principal string `json:"Principal"`; ResourceName string `json:"ResourceName"`; ResourcePatternType string `json:"ResourcePatternType"`; ResourceType string `json:"ResourceType"` }
TYPE AuthMethodConfig struct { IAM *IAMConfig `yaml:"iam,omitempty"`; SASLPlain *SASLPlainConfig `yaml:"sasl_plain,omitempty"`; SASLScram *SASLScramConfig `yaml:"sasl_scram,omitempty"`; TLS *TLSConfig `yaml:"tls,omitempty"`; UnauthenticatedPlaintext *UnauthenticatedPlaintextConfig `yaml:"unauthenticated_plaintext,omitempty"`; UnauthenticatedTLS *UnauthenticatedTLSConfig `yaml:"unauthenticated_tls,omitempty"` }
TYPE AuthType = string
TYPE BastionHostRequest struct { HasExistingInternetGateway bool `json:"has_existing_internet_gateway"`; PublicSubnetCidr string `json:"public_subnet_cidr"`; Region string `json:"region"`; SecurityGroupIds []string `json:"security_group_ids"`; VPCId string `json:"vpc_id"` }
TYPE BrokerType = string
TYPE CloudWatchTimeWindow struct { EndTime time.Time; Period int32; StartTime time.Time }
TYPE ClusterAuth struct { Arn string `yaml:"arn"`; AuthMethod AuthMethodConfig `yaml:"auth_method"`; Name string `yaml:"name"` }
TYPE ClusterMetrics struct { MetricMetadata MetricMetadata `json:"metadata"`; QueryInfo []MetricQueryInfo `json:"query_info"`; Results []cloudwatchtypes.MetricDataResult `json:"results"` }
TYPE ClusterNetworking struct { SecurityGroups []string `json:"security_groups"`; SubnetIds []string `json:"subnet_ids"`; Subnets []SubnetInfo `json:"subnets"`; VpcId string `json:"vpc_id"` }
TYPE ConnectAuthMethod = string
TYPE ConnectSaslScramAuth struct { Password string; Username string }
TYPE ConnectTlsAuth struct { CACert string; ClientCert string; ClientKey string }
TYPE ConnectorSummary struct { Capacity kafkaconnecttypes.CapacityDescription `json:"capacity"`; ConnectorArn string `json:"connector_arn"`; ConnectorConfiguration map[string]string `json:"connector_configuration"`; ConnectorName string `json:"connector_name"`; ConnectorState string `json:"connector_state"`; CreationTime string `json:"creation_time"`; KafkaCluster kafkaconnecttypes.ApacheKafkaClusterDescription `json:"kafka_cluster"`; KafkaClusterClientAuthentication kafkaconnecttypes.KafkaClusterClientAuthenticationDescription `json:"kafka_cluster_client_authentication"`; Plugins []kafkaconnecttypes.PluginDescription `json:"plugins"` }
TYPE CostAggregate struct { Average *float64 `json:"avg"`; Maximum *float64 `json:"max"`; Minimum *float64 `json:"min"`; Sum *float64 `json:"sum"` }
TYPE CostInformation struct { CostMetadata CostMetadata `json:"metadata"`; CostResults []costexplorertypes.ResultByTime `json:"results"`; QueryInfo CostQueryInfo `json:"query_info"` }
TYPE CostMetadata struct { EndDate time.Time `json:"end_date"`; Granularity string `json:"granularity"`; Services []string `json:"services"`; StartDate time.Time `json:"start_date"`; Tags map[string][]string `json:"tags"` }
TYPE CostQueryInfo struct { AWSCLICommand string `json:"aws_cli_command"`; AggregationNote string `json:"aggregation_note"`; ConsoleURL string `json:"console_url"`; Granularity string `json:"granularity"`; GroupBy []string `json:"group_by"`; Metrics []string `json:"metrics"`; Regions []string `json:"regions"`; Services []string `json:"services"`; Tags map[string][]string `json:"tags,omitempty"`; TimePeriod CostQueryTimePeriod `json:"time_period"` }
TYPE CostQueryTimePeriod struct { End string `json:"end"`; Start string `json:"start"` }
TYPE Credentials struct { Regions []RegionAuth `yaml:"regions"` }
TYPE DiscoveredClient struct { Auth string `json:"auth"`; ClientId string `json:"client_id"`; CompositeKey string `json:"composite_key"`; Principal string `json:"principal"`; Role string `json:"role"`; Timestamp time.Time `json:"timestamp"`; Topic string `json:"topic"` }
TYPE DiscoveredCluster struct { AWSClientInformation AWSClientInformation `json:"aws_client_information"`; Arn string `json:"arn"`; ClusterMetrics ClusterMetrics `json:"metrics"`; DiscoveredClients []DiscoveredClient `json:"discovered_clients"`; KafkaAdminClientInformation KafkaAdminClientInformation `json:"kafka_admin_client_information"`; Name string `json:"name"`; Region string `json:"region"` }
TYPE DiscoveredRegion struct { ClusterArns []string `json:"-"`; Clusters []DiscoveredCluster `json:"clusters"`; Configurations []kafka.DescribeConfigurationRevisionOutput `json:"configurations"`; Costs CostInformation `json:"costs"`; Name string `json:"name"` }
TYPE ExtOutboundClusterKafkaBroker struct { Endpoints []ExtOutboundClusterKafkaEndpoint `json:"endpoints"`; ID string `json:"broker_id"`; SubnetID string `json:"subnet_id"` }
TYPE ExtOutboundClusterKafkaEndpoint struct { Host string `json:"host"`; IP string `json:"ip"`; Port int `json:"port"` }
TYPE GatewayResource struct { Spec GatewaySpec `yaml:"spec"` }
TYPE GatewaySpec struct { Routes []Route `yaml:"routes"`; StreamingDomains []StreamingDomain `yaml:"streamingDomains"` }
TYPE GlueSchema struct { DataFormat string `json:"data_format"`; Latest *GlueSchemaVersion `json:"latest_version"`; SchemaArn string `json:"schema_arn"`; SchemaName string `json:"schema_name"`; Versions []GlueSchemaVersion `json:"versions"` }
TYPE GlueSchemaRegistryInformation struct { Region string `json:"region"`; RegistryArn string `json:"registry_arn"`; RegistryName string `json:"registry_name"`; Schemas []GlueSchema `json:"schemas"` }
TYPE GlueSchemaRegistryMigrationConfig struct { Migrate bool `json:"migrate"`; Region string `json:"region"`; RegistryName string `json:"registry_name"`; Schemas []GlueSchema `json:"schemas"` }
TYPE GlueSchemaVersion struct { CreatedDate time.Time `json:"created_date"`; DataFormat string `json:"data_format"`; SchemaDefinition string `json:"schema_definition"`; Status string `json:"status"`; VersionNumber int64 `json:"version_number"` }
TYPE IAMConfig struct { Use bool `yaml:"use"` }
TYPE JolokiaAuthConfig struct { Password string `yaml:"password"`; Username string `yaml:"username"` }
TYPE JolokiaConfig struct { Auth *JolokiaAuthConfig `yaml:"auth,omitempty"`; Endpoints []string `yaml:"endpoints"`; TLS *JolokiaTLSConfig `yaml:"tls,omitempty"` }
TYPE JolokiaTLSConfig struct { CACert string `yaml:"ca_cert,omitempty"`; InsecureSkipVerify bool `yaml:"insecure_skip_verify,omitempty"` }
TYPE KafkaAdminClientInformation struct { Acls []Acls `json:"acls"`; ClusterID string `json:"cluster_id"`; DiscoveredBrokers []string `json:"discovered_brokers,omitempty"`; SaslMechanism string `json:"sasl_mechanism,omitempty"`; SelfManagedConnectors *SelfManagedConnectors `json:"self_managed_connectors"`; Topics *Topics `json:"topics"` }
TYPE KcpBuildInfo struct { Commit string `json:"commit"`; Date string `json:"date"`; Version string `json:"version"` }
TYPE MSKSourcesState struct { Regions []DiscoveredRegion `json:"regions"` }
TYPE Manifest struct { MigrationInfraType MigrationType `json:"migration_infra_type"` }
TYPE MetricAggregate struct { Average *float64 `json:"avg"`; Maximum *float64 `json:"max"`; Minimum *float64 `json:"min"` }
TYPE MetricBackend = string
TYPE MetricMetadata struct { BrokerAzDistribution string `json:"broker_az_distribution"`; BrokerType BrokerType `json:"broker_type"`; ClusterType string `json:"cluster_type"`; EndDate time.Time `json:"end_date"`; EnhancedMonitoring string `json:"enhanced_monitoring"`; FollowerFetching bool `json:"follower_fetching"`; InstanceType string `json:"instance_type"`; KafkaVersion string `json:"kafka_version"`; NumberOfBrokerNodes int `json:"number_of_broker_nodes"`; Period int32 `json:"period"`; StartDate time.Time `json:"start_date"`; TieredStorage bool `json:"tiered_storage"` }
TYPE MetricQueryInfo struct { AWSCLICommand string `json:"aws_cli_command,omitempty"`; AggregationNote string `json:"aggregation_note"`; ConsoleSourceJSON string `json:"console_source_json,omitempty"`; CurlCommand string `json:"curl_command,omitempty"`; Dimensions string `json:"dimensions,omitempty"`; JolokiaURL string `json:"jolokia_url,omitempty"`; MBeanPath string `json:"mbean_path,omitempty"`; MathExpression string `json:"math_expression,omitempty"`; MetricName string `json:"metric_name"`; Namespace string `json:"namespace,omitempty"`; Period int32 `json:"period,omitempty"`; PromQLQuery string `json:"promql_query,omitempty"`; PrometheusMetricName string `json:"prometheus_metric_name,omitempty"`; PrometheusURL string `json:"prometheus_url,omitempty"`; QueryDuration string `json:"query_duration,omitempty"`; SearchExpression string `json:"search_expression,omitempty"`; SourceType MetricBackend `json:"source_type,omitempty"`; Statistic string `json:"statistic,omitempty"` }
TYPE MigrateAclsRequest struct { AclsByPrincipal map[string][]Acls `json:"-"`; ClusterId string `json:"cluster_id"`; PreventDestroy bool `json:"prevent_destroy"`; SelectedPrincipals []string `json:"selected_principals"`; SourceType string `json:"source_type"`; TargetClusterId string `json:"target_cluster_id"`; TargetClusterRestEndpoint string `json:"target_cluster_rest_endpoint"` }
TYPE MigrateGlueSchemasRequest struct { ConfluentCloudSchemaRegistryURL string `json:"confluent_cloud_schema_registry_url"`; GlueRegistries []GlueSchemaRegistryMigrationConfig `json:"glue_registries"` }
TYPE MigrateSchemasRequest struct { ConfluentCloudSchemaRegistryURL string `json:"confluent_cloud_schema_registry_url"`; SchemaRegistries []SchemaRegistryExporterConfig `json:"schema_registries"` }
TYPE MigrationConfig struct { ClusterBootstrap string `json:"cluster_bootstrap"`; ClusterId string `json:"cluster_id"`; ClusterLinkConfigs map[string]string `json:"cluster_link_configs"`; ClusterLinkName string `json:"cluster_link_name"`; ClusterLinkTopics []string `json:"cluster_link_topics"`; ClusterRestEndpoint string `json:"cluster_rest_endpoint"`; CurrentState string `json:"current_state"`; FencedCrYAML []byte `json:"fenced_cr_yaml"`; InitialCrName string `json:"initial_cr_name"`; InitialCrYAML []byte `json:"initial_cr_yaml"`; K8sNamespace string `json:"k8s_namespace"`; KubeConfigPath string `json:"kube_config_path"`; MigrationId string `json:"migration_id"`; SourceBootstrap string `json:"source_bootstrap"`; SwitchoverCrYAML []byte `json:"switchover_cr_yaml"`; Topics []string `json:"topics"` }
TYPE MigrationInfraTerraformModule struct { AdditionalFiles map[string]string `json:"additional_files"`; MainTf string `json:"main.tf"`; Name string `json:"name"`; OutputsTf string `json:"outputs.tf"`; VariablesTf string `json:"variables.tf"`; VersionsTf string `json:"versions.tf"` }
TYPE MigrationInfraTerraformProject struct { InputsAutoTfvars string `json:"inputs.auto.tfvars"`; MainTf string `json:"main.tf"`; Modules []MigrationInfraTerraformModule `json:"modules"`; OutputsTf string `json:"outputs.tf"`; ProvidersTf string `json:"providers.tf"`; ReadmeMd string `json:"README.md"`; VariablesTf string `json:"variables.tf"` }
TYPE MigrationScriptsTerraformFolder struct { AdditionalFiles map[string]string `json:"additional_files,omitempty"`; InputsAutoTfvars string `json:"inputs.auto.tfvars"`; MainTf string `json:"main.tf"`; Name string `json:"name"`; ProvidersTf string `json:"providers.tf"`; VariablesTf string `json:"variables.tf"` }
TYPE MigrationScriptsTerraformProject struct { Folders []MigrationScriptsTerraformFolder `json:"modules"` }
TYPE MigrationState struct { KcpBuildInfo KcpBuildInfo `json:"kcp_build_info"`; Migrations []MigrationConfig `json:"migrations"`; Timestamp time.Time `json:"timestamp"` }
TYPE MigrationType = int
TYPE MigrationWizardRequest struct { ClusterLinkName string `json:"cluster_link_name"`; ExistingPrivateLinkVpceId string `json:"existing_private_link_vpce_id"`; ExtOutboundBrokers []ExtOutboundClusterKafkaBroker `json:"source_kafka_brokers"`; ExtOutboundSecurityGroupId string `json:"ext_outbound_security_group_id"`; ExtOutboundSubnetId string `json:"ext_outbound_subnet_id"`; HasExistingInternetGateway bool `json:"has_existing_internet_gateway"`; HasPublicEndpoints bool `json:"has_public_brokers"`; JumpClusterAuthType string `json:"jump_cluster_auth_type"`; JumpClusterBrokerStorage int `json:"jump_cluster_broker_storage"`; JumpClusterBrokerSubnetCidr []string `json:"jump_cluster_broker_subnet_cidr"`; JumpClusterIamAuthRoleName string `json:"jump_cluster_iam_auth_role_name"`; JumpClusterInstanceType string `json:"jump_cluster_instance_type"`; JumpClusterSetupHostSubnetCidr string `json:"jump_cluster_setup_host_subnet_cidr"`; SourceClusterId string `json:"source_cluster_id"`; SourcePlaintextBootstrapServers string `json:"source_plaintext_bootstrap_servers"`; SourceRegion string `json:"source_region"`; SourceSaslIamBootstrapServers string `json:"source_sasl_iam_bootstrap_servers"`; SourceSaslScramBootstrapServers string `json:"source_sasl_scram_bootstrap_servers"`; SourceSaslScramMechanism string `json:"source_sasl_scram_mechanism"`; TargetBootstrapEndpoint string `json:"target_bootstrap_endpoint"`; TargetClusterId string `json:"target_cluster_id"`; TargetClusterType string `json:"target_cluster_type"`; TargetEnvironmentId string `json:"target_environment_id"`; TargetRestEndpoint string `json:"target_rest_endpoint"`; UseJumpClusters bool `json:"use_jump_clusters"`; VpcId string `json:"vpc_id"` }
TYPE MirrorTopicsRequest struct { ClusterId string `json:"cluster_id"`; ClusterLinkName string `json:"cluster_link_name"`; ExcludePatterns []string `json:"topics_exclude"`; IncludePatterns []string `json:"topics_include"`; Mode string `json:"mode"`; SelectedTopics []string `json:"selected_topics"`; SourceType string `json:"source_type"`; TargetClusterId string `json:"target_cluster_id"`; TargetClusterRestEndpoint string `json:"target_cluster_rest_endpoint"`; Topics []TopicDetails `json:"-"` }
TYPE OSKClusterAuth struct { AuthMethod AuthMethodConfig `yaml:"auth_method"`; BootstrapServers []string `yaml:"bootstrap_servers"`; ID string `yaml:"id"`; InsecureSkipTLSVerify bool `yaml:"insecure_skip_tls_verify,omitempty"`; Jolokia *JolokiaConfig `yaml:"jolokia,omitempty"`; Metadata OSKCredentialMetadata `yaml:"metadata,omitempty"`; Prometheus *PrometheusConfig `yaml:"prometheus,omitempty"` }
TYPE OSKClusterMetadata struct { Environment string `json:"environment,omitempty"`; KafkaVersion string `json:"kafka_version,omitempty"`; Labels map[string]string `json:"labels,omitempty"`; LastScanned time.Time `json:"last_scanned"`; Location string `json:"location,omitempty"` }
TYPE OSKCredentialMetadata struct { Environment string `yaml:"environment,omitempty"`; Labels map[string]string `yaml:"labels,omitempty"`; Location string `yaml:"location,omitempty"` }
TYPE OSKCredentials struct { Clusters []OSKClusterAuth `yaml:"clusters"` }
TYPE OSKDiscoveredCluster struct { BootstrapServers []string `json:"bootstrap_servers"`; ClusterMetrics *ProcessedClusterMetrics `json:"metrics,omitempty"`; DiscoveredClients []DiscoveredClient `json:"discovered_clients"`; ID string `json:"id"`; KafkaAdminClientInformation KafkaAdminClientInformation `json:"kafka_admin_client_information"`; Metadata OSKClusterMetadata `json:"metadata"` }
TYPE OSKSourcesState struct { Clusters []OSKDiscoveredCluster `json:"clusters"` }
TYPE ProcessedAggregates struct { AWSCertificateManager ServiceCostAggregates `json:"AWS Certificate Manager"`; AmazonManagedStreamingForApacheKafka ServiceCostAggregates `json:"Amazon Managed Streaming for Apache Kafka"`; AmazonVPC ServiceCostAggregates `json:"Amazon Virtual Private Cloud"`; EC2Other ServiceCostAggregates `json:"EC2 - Other"`; ElasticLoadBalancing ServiceCostAggregates `json:"Amazon Elastic Load Balancing"` }
TYPE ProcessedCluster struct { AWSClientInformation AWSClientInformation `json:"aws_client_information"`; Arn string `json:"arn"`; ClusterMetrics ProcessedClusterMetrics `json:"metrics"`; DiscoveredClients []DiscoveredClient `json:"discovered_clients"`; KafkaAdminClientInformation KafkaAdminClientInformation `json:"kafka_admin_client_information"`; Name string `json:"name"`; Region string `json:"region"` }
TYPE ProcessedClusterMetrics struct { Aggregates map[string]MetricAggregate `json:"aggregates"`; ClusterArn string `json:"cluster_arn"`; Environment string `json:"environment,omitempty"`; Location string `json:"location,omitempty"`; Metadata MetricMetadata `json:"metadata"`; Metrics []ProcessedMetric `json:"results"`; QueryInfo []MetricQueryInfo `json:"query_info"`; Region string `json:"region"` }
TYPE ProcessedCost struct { End string `json:"end"`; Service string `json:"service"`; Start string `json:"start"`; UsageType string `json:"usage_type"`; Values ProcessedCostBreakdown `json:"values"` }
TYPE ProcessedCostBreakdown struct { AmortizedCost float64 `json:"amortized_cost"`; BlendedCost float64 `json:"blended_cost"`; NetAmortizedCost float64 `json:"net_amortized_cost"`; NetUnblendedCost float64 `json:"net_unblended_cost"`; UnblendedCost float64 `json:"unblended_cost"` }
TYPE ProcessedMSKSource struct { Regions []ProcessedRegion `json:"regions"` }
TYPE ProcessedMetric struct { End string `json:"end"`; Label string `json:"label"`; Start string `json:"start"`; Value *float64 `json:"value"` }
TYPE ProcessedOSKCluster struct { BootstrapServers []string `json:"bootstrap_servers"`; ClusterMetrics *ProcessedClusterMetrics `json:"metrics,omitempty"`; DiscoveredClients []DiscoveredClient `json:"discovered_clients"`; ID string `json:"id"`; KafkaAdminClientInformation KafkaAdminClientInformation `json:"kafka_admin_client_information"`; Metadata OSKClusterMetadata `json:"metadata"` }
TYPE ProcessedOSKSource struct { Clusters []ProcessedOSKCluster `json:"clusters"` }
TYPE ProcessedRegion struct { Clusters []ProcessedCluster `json:"clusters"`; Configurations []kafka.DescribeConfigurationRevisionOutput `json:"configurations"`; Costs ProcessedRegionCosts `json:"costs"`; Name string `json:"name"` }
TYPE ProcessedRegionCosts struct { Aggregates ProcessedAggregates `json:"aggregates"`; Metadata CostMetadata `json:"metadata"`; QueryInfo CostQueryInfo `json:"query_info"`; Region string `json:"region"`; Results []ProcessedCost `json:"results"` }
TYPE ProcessedSource struct { MSKData *ProcessedMSKSource `json:"msk_data,omitempty"`; OSKData *ProcessedOSKSource `json:"osk_data,omitempty"`; Type SourceType `json:"type"` }
TYPE ProcessedState struct { KcpBuildInfo interface{} `json:"kcp_build_info,omitempty"`; SchemaRegistries *SchemaRegistriesState `json:"schema_registries,omitempty"`; Sources []ProcessedSource `json:"sources"`; Timestamp time.Time `json:"timestamp"` }
TYPE PrometheusAuthConfig struct { Password string `yaml:"password"`; Username string `yaml:"username"` }
TYPE PrometheusConfig struct { Auth *PrometheusAuthConfig `yaml:"auth,omitempty"`; TLS *PrometheusTLSConfig `yaml:"tls,omitempty"`; URL string `yaml:"url"` }
TYPE PrometheusTLSConfig struct { CACert string `yaml:"ca_cert,omitempty"`; InsecureSkipVerify bool `yaml:"insecure_skip_verify,omitempty"` }
TYPE RegionAuth struct { Clusters []ClusterAuth `yaml:"clusters"`; Name string `yaml:"name"` }
TYPE ReverseProxyRequest struct { ConfluentCloudClusterBootstrapEndpoint string `json:"confluent_cloud_cluster_bootstrap_endpoint"`; PublicSubnetCidr string `json:"public_subnet_cidr"`; Region string `json:"region"`; VPCId string `json:"vpc_id"` }
TYPE Route struct { Fence *RouteFence `yaml:"fence,omitempty"`; Name string `yaml:"name"`; Security RouteSecurity `yaml:"security"`; StreamingDomain RouteStreamingDomain `yaml:"streamingDomain"` }
TYPE RouteFence struct { ErrorCode string `yaml:"errorCode"`; ErrorMessage string `yaml:"errorMessage"`; Scope string `yaml:"scope"` }
TYPE RouteSecurity struct { Auth string `yaml:"auth"`; Client RouteSecurityConfig `yaml:"client"`; Cluster RouteSecurityConfig `yaml:"cluster"` }
TYPE RouteSecurityAuthentication struct { Type string `yaml:"type"` }
TYPE RouteSecurityConfig struct { Authentication RouteSecurityAuthentication `yaml:"authentication"` }
TYPE RouteStreamingDomain struct { BootstrapServerId string `yaml:"bootstrapServerId"`; Name string `yaml:"name"` }
TYPE SASLPlainConfig struct { Password string `yaml:"password"`; Use bool `yaml:"use"`; Username string `yaml:"username"` }
TYPE SASLScramConfig struct { Mechanism string `yaml:"mechanism,omitempty"`; Password string `yaml:"password"`; Use bool `yaml:"use"`; Username string `yaml:"username"` }
TYPE SchemaRegistriesState struct { AWSGlue []GlueSchemaRegistryInformation `json:"aws_glue,omitempty"`; ConfluentSchemaRegistry []SchemaRegistryInformation `json:"confluent_schema_registry,omitempty"` }
TYPE SchemaRegistryAuthType = string
TYPE SchemaRegistryExporterConfig struct { Migrate bool `json:"migrate"`; SourceURL string `json:"source_url"`; Subjects []string `json:"subjects"` }
TYPE SchemaRegistryInformation struct { Contexts []string `json:"contexts"`; DefaultCompatibility schemaregistry.Compatibility `json:"default_compatibility"`; Subjects []Subject `json:"subjects"`; Type string `json:"type"`; URL string `json:"url"` }
TYPE SelfManagedConnector struct { Config map[string]any `json:"config"`; ConnectHost string `json:"connect_host,omitempty"`; Name string `json:"name"`; State string `json:"state,omitempty"` }
TYPE SelfManagedConnectors struct { Connectors []SelfManagedConnector `json:"connectors"` }
TYPE ServiceCostAggregates struct { AmortizedCost map[string]any `json:"amortized_cost"`; BlendedCost map[string]any `json:"blended_cost"`; NetAmortizedCost map[string]any `json:"net_amortized_cost"`; NetUnblendedCost map[string]any `json:"net_unblended_cost"`; UnblendedCost map[string]any `json:"unblended_cost"` }
TYPE SourceType = string
TYPE State struct { KcpBuildInfo KcpBuildInfo `json:"kcp_build_info"`; MSKSources *MSKSourcesState `json:"msk_sources,omitempty"`; OSKSources *OSKSourcesState `json:"osk_sources,omitempty"`; SchemaRegistries *SchemaRegistriesState `json:"schema_registries,omitempty"`; Timestamp time.Time `json:"timestamp"` }
TYPE StreamingDomain struct { Name string `yaml:"name"` }
TYPE Subject struct { Compatibility string `json:"compatibility,omitempty"`; Latest schemaregistry.SchemaMetadata `json:"latest_schema"`; Name string `json:"name"`; SchemaType string `json:"schema_type"`; Versions []schemaregistry.SchemaMetadata `json:"versions"` }
TYPE SubnetInfo struct { AvailabilityZone string `json:"availability_zone"`; CidrBlock string `json:"cidr_block"`; PrivateIpAddress string `json:"private_ip_address"`; SubnetId string `json:"subnet_id"`; SubnetMskBrokerId int `json:"subnet_msk_broker_id"` }
TYPE TLSConfig struct { CACert string `yaml:"ca_cert"`; ClientCert string `yaml:"client_cert"`; ClientKey string `yaml:"client_key"`; Use bool `yaml:"use"` }
TYPE TargetClusterWizardRequest struct { AwsRegion string `json:"aws_region"`; ClusterAvailability string `json:"cluster_availability"`; ClusterCku int `json:"cluster_cku"`; ClusterName string `json:"cluster_name"`; ClusterType string `json:"cluster_type"`; EnvironmentId string `json:"environment_id"`; EnvironmentName string `json:"environment_name"`; NeedsCluster bool `json:"needs_cluster"`; NeedsEnvironment bool `json:"needs_environment"`; NeedsPrivateLink bool `json:"needs_private_link"`; PreventDestroy bool `json:"prevent_destroy"`; SubnetCidrRanges []string `json:"subnet_cidr_ranges"`; UseExistingRoute53Zone bool `json:"use_existing_route53_zone"`; VpcId string `json:"vpc_id"` }
TYPE TerraformFiles struct { InputsAutoTfvars string `json:"inputs.auto.tfvars"`; MainTf string `json:"main.tf"`; OutputsTf string `json:"outputs.tf"`; PerPrincipalTf map[string]string `json:"per_principal_tf,omitempty"`; ProvidersTf string `json:"providers.tf"`; VariablesTf string `json:"variables.tf"` }
TYPE TerraformOutput struct { Description string; Name string; Sensitive bool; Value string }
TYPE TerraformOutputOld struct { ConfluentCloudClusterApiKey TerraformOutputValue `json:"confluent_cloud_cluster_api_key"`; ConfluentCloudClusterApiKeySecret TerraformOutputValue `json:"confluent_cloud_cluster_api_key_secret"`; ConfluentCloudClusterBootstrapEndpoint TerraformOutputValue `json:"confluent_cloud_cluster_bootstrap_endpoint"`; ConfluentCloudClusterId TerraformOutputValue `json:"confluent_cloud_cluster_id"`; ConfluentCloudClusterRestEndpoint TerraformOutputValue `json:"confluent_cloud_cluster_rest_endpoint"`; ConfluentPlatformControllerBootstrapServer TerraformOutputValue `json:"confluent_platform_controller_bootstrap_server"` }
TYPE TerraformOutputValue struct { Sensitive bool `json:"sensitive"`; Type string `json:"type"`; Value any `json:"value"` }
TYPE TerraformState struct { Outputs TerraformOutputOld `json:"outputs"` }
TYPE TerraformVariable struct { Description string `json:"description"`; Name string `json:"name"`; Sensitive bool `json:"sensitive"`; Type string `json:"type"` }
TYPE TopicDetails struct { Configurations map[string]*string `json:"configurations"`; Name string `json:"name"`; Partitions int `json:"partitions"`; ReplicationFactor int `json:"replication_factor"` }
TYPE TopicSummary struct { CompactInternalPartitions int `json:"compact_internal_partitions"`; CompactInternalTopics int `json:"compact_internal_topics"`; CompactPartitions int `json:"compact_partitions"`; CompactTopics int `json:"compact_topics"`; InternalTopics int `json:"internal_topics"`; RemoteStorageTopics int `json:"remote_storage_topics"`; Topics int `json:"topics"`; TotalInternalPartitions int `json:"total_internal_partitions"`; TotalPartitions int `json:"total_partitions"` }
TYPE Topics struct { Details []TopicDetails `json:"details"`; Summary TopicSummary `json:"summary"` }
TYPE UnauthenticatedPlaintextConfig struct { Use bool `yaml:"use"` }
TYPE UnauthenticatedTLSConfig struct { Use bool `yaml:"use"` }
VAR AclMap = map[string]ACLMapping{ "kafka-cluster:AlterCluster": { Operation: "Alter", ResourceType: "Cluster", RequiresPattern: false, }, "kafka-cluster:AlterClusterDynamicConfiguration": { "Delete", ResourceType: "Topic", RequiresPattern: true, }, "kafka-cluster:DescribeCluster": { Operation: "Describe", ResourceType: "Cluster", RequiresPattern: false, }, "kafka-cluster:DescribeClusterDynamicConfiguration": { Operation: "DescribeConfigs", ResourceType: "Cluster", RequiresPattern: false, }, "kafka-cluster:DescribeGroup": { Operation: "Describe", ResourceType: "Group", RequiresPattern: true, }, "kafka-cluster:DescribeTopic": { Operation: "Describe", ResourceType: "Topic", RequiresPattern: true, }, "kafka-cluster:DescribeTopicDynamicConfiguration": { Operation: "DescribeConfigs", ResourceType: "Topic", RequiresPattern: true, }, "kafka-cluster:DescribeTransactionalId": { Operation: "Describe", ResourceType: "TransactionalId", RequiresPattern: true, }, "kafka-cluster:ReadData": { Operation: "Read", ResourceType: "Topic", RequiresPattern: true, }, "kafka-cluster:WriteData": { Operation:
